search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Kept results limited to lastzwiki.com pages. Best discovery leads are the dedicated Heroes and Laboratory pages; the home page is only a navigation hub.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster and equipment page; useful for hero discovery, faction grouping, and gear lookup.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, factions, levels, and equipment references.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with categories, level costs, and badge totals; useful for research discovery and cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories, upgrade names, and badge costs per level.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English home hub linking to hero and research sections plus other gameplay guides.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to major Last Z guide sections.

search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to lastz.fandom.com only. Results favor wiki pages directly tied to research, heroes, and event systems. No public claims should be marked ready from a single source.

results.title: Full Preparedness
results.evidence_summary: Daily event with rotating cycles; one theme rewards tech research speed-ups and another rewards hero upgrades/recruitment items.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks and reward categories for research and hero progress
claims_to_verify: Cycle order by day and time
Scoring tied to research, hero upgrades, troop training, vehicle mods, and building upgrades
Reward chest contents and ranking payouts

results.title: Heroes
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page with hero types and what affects hero power, including tech-related boosts.
results.primary_user_job: Understand hero classes and power sources before optimizing research-linked progress
claims_to_verify: Power components such as level, stars, skills, equipment, vehicle, structure, technologies

results.title: Event Center
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events; useful for locating where daily event details live.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to event tabs and locate rules/rewards quickly

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com returned no matches for the requested Last Z gear guide query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results found on the allowed domain for the supplied query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com and surfaced multiple Last Z-specific guide pages. Generic home pages were ignored. One result from a magazine/article path was excluded because it is less direct than the dedicated guide pages.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page on Shooter Camp training, upgrades, capacity, speed, and power for ranged units.
results.primary_user_job: Understand Shooter Camp upgrades and training effects
claims_to_verify: training cap and speed values by level

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page on Laboratory research role, tech progression, and second lab unlock.
results.primary_user_job: Learn Laboratory research functions and unlock path

results.title: Zombie Siege Event Guide: HQ Defense & Reinforcement Strategy | Last Z
results.evidence_summary: Event guide for alliance defense during Zombie Siege, including duration, knockout rule, and alliance scoring context.
results.primary_user_job: Prepare for Zombie Siege event defense
